scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: replaces Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=hiQ9200 2060517124 390201412 IN IP4 10.3.202.31 s=Phone c=IN IP4 10.3.202.31 a=fmtp:8 vad=no t=0 0 m=audio 2948 RTP/SAVP 8 101 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sqn: 0 a=cdsc: 1 image udptl t38 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:6YRE3zNmGVxuSFlHEn9Y+L2Yn/x/AAJx+TiUTCk2 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP
